text.title: Agent Failure Taxonomy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-failure-taxonomy is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4: every label must change action; merge or split until each is actionable.

antipattern.description: Two postmortems for the same root cause use different labels.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r1 + r5: shared default labels, one primary per instance.

antipattern.description: Label changed from 'tool-misuse' to 'hallucination' silently; trend chart shifts.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r3: append-only with history.
